about.label: // About me
about.title: Bridging Human Logic and Artificial Intelligence.
about.bio1: I'm a self-motivated Full-Stack Developer with a deep commitment to building intelligent systems and elegant technical solutions. With 5+ years of experience spanning backend architecture, AI models, and computer vision, I thrive at the intersection of engineering precision and human-centered design.
about.bio2: In my free time I'm passionate about the intersection of Machine Learning and creative applications. I aim to build truly scalable systems with mathematical precision.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.desc: Robust, type-safe systems and pixel-perfect interfaces built on battle-tested foundations. Clean architecture and seamless user experience.

ai.title: AI & LLM Engineering
ai.desc: Intelligent AI co-pilots using large language models, vector databases, RAG pipelines, and FastAPI services ready for real-world deployment.

vision.title: Computer Vision
vision.desc: Real-time visual intelligence systems for detection, segmentation, and tracking. Built with OpenCV and trained models for industrial applications.

backend.title: Backend & Infrastructure
backend.desc: Reliable server architectures, RESTful APIs, and containerized deployments with Docker. Scalable and maintainable from day one.

icloud.highlight: Led the development of two innovative projects: an AI Chatbot (LLM) for compliance standard consultation and a Document Manager with defined roles and permissions.

siali.highlight: Developed computer vision systems with real-time camera processing for Mercadona and GSK. Responsible for AI training for detection and segmentation, and intuitive web interfaces.

viacore.highlight: Integrated ReactJS with TypeScript and Material UI to build interactive dashboards for healthcare professionals, and a patient monitoring system using Express.js.

funiber.highlight: Designed end-to-end architecture (business logic, data models, APIs), managed MySQL databases, and implemented Docker-based deployment with PHP/Laravel.
